creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Currently the fpc-httpd unit was splitted to three new ports www/fpc-httpd13, www/fpc-httpd20, www/fpc-httpd22. I need these new ports for complete my update of freepascal to 2.2.2

Fix: 

- Repocopy www/fpc-httpd to www/fpc-httpd13, www/fpc-httpd20 and www/fpc-httpd22
